interaction_phrase: closing of a pre-seed round with Quantum investment fund
occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals announced the closing of a pre-seed round with Quantum investment fund Quantonation that will support the market entry of its first platform, ATLAS, a software suite for the discovery and test of drug candidates running on supercomputers to co-design new drugs with pharma and biotech companies.

Qubit Pharmaceuticals announced the closing of a pre-seed round with Quantum investment fund Quantonation that will support the market entry of its first platform, ATLAS, a software suite for the discovery and test of drug candidates running on supercomputers to co-design new drugs with pharma and biotech companies.

interaction_phrase: the spin-off of the research work of 5 internationally renowned scientists in
occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals is the result of the spin-off of the research work of 5 internationally renowned scientists in the United States and in France, collaborating together on the science and the technology for more than 15 years, all 5 providing scientific support to the company.

interaction_phrase: the spin-off of the research work of 5 internationally renowned scientists in
occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals is the result of the spin-off of the research work of 5 internationally renowned scientists[1] in the United States and in France, collaborating together on the science and the technology for more than 15 years, all 5 providing scientific support to the company.
Quantonation Partner Christophe Jurczak said: "Quantum computing is an emerging technology with the potential to transform many industries, with biopharma and materials among the most promising.
Quantonation Partner **Christophe Jurczak** said: "Quantum computing is an emerging technology with the potential to transform many industries, with biopharma and materials among the most promising.
Christophe Jurczak is partner at Quantonation, early stage investment fund dedicated to Quantum Technologies and Deep Physics, and founder of not for profit Le Lab Quantique.
